destinations.evidence: Phase 1 settlement preparation propagates fee-calculation failures instead of synthesizing a fallback settlement.
destinations.snippet:
let fees = calculate_async_fees(... )
    .map_err(|err| format!("async fee calculation failed: {err}"))?;

destinations.evidence: Phase 2 delivery settlement preparation also propagates unpriceable fee errors.
Both fulfilled and delivery-ready async collection loops continue on preparation errors, so no fallback settlement/original inclusion is added for unpriceable async transactions.

equivalence_argument: The port implements the no-fallback policy by making fee calculation part of settlement preparation and treating preparation errors as skip conditions in both fulfilled and delivery-ready async loops.

checked_queries: calculate_async_fees|create_settlement_transaction|Transaction will be skipped|will be skipped|settlement fee

rationale: The builder now handles `create_settlement_transaction` as a `Result`; errors from `calculate_async_fees` log 'Transaction will be skipped' and the loop continues without adding the async transaction. This result keeps the candidate as a distinct refined invariant because the bounded assignment packet does not contain a newer candidate that clearly supersedes it. Implementation-detail caveat: The exact error path and log message are implementation details; a future builder might quarantine or defer the transaction rather than using `continue` while preserving the no-fallback policy.
statement: During payload building, an async transaction whose settlement fee calculation fails is skipped and not included with a fallback settlement transaction.
suggested_falsification_tests: Put an async LLM transaction with unpriceable executor output in the pool and build a payload; assert the transaction and settlement are absent from the payload and no fallback fee settlement is created.
summary: Unpriceable async settlements are skipped without fallback inclusion in the port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Put an async transaction whose fee helper returns Err into fulfilled and delivery-ready paths and assert payload building skips it without adding any fallback settlement transaction.
title: Builder skips unpriceable async transactions
